name: HIPAA Security Rule 主机基线 (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act)
description: HIPAA Security Rule §164.308-§164.312 Administrative/Physical/Technical Safeguards 适用于 Linux 主机的部分

rules.title: 唯一用户标识 (Unique User ID)
rules.description: §164.308(a)(4)(i) 每用户独立账户, 禁用通用账户

fix.suggestion: userdel guest / public 或 usermod -L 锁定
yum install vlock 或配置 GNOME screen lock 10min
fix.command: if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf install -y vlock || yum install -y vlock; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum install -y vlock; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y vlock; fi

rules.title: 强制访问控制 SELinux/AppArmor
rules.description: §164.312(a)(1) PHI 数据访问最小权限

param: aa-status 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'profiles are in enforce mode'

fix.command: if command -v getenforce >/dev/null 2>&1; then F=/etc/selinux/config; cp -a "$F" "$F.mxbak" 2>/dev/null; (grep -qE '^\s*SELINUX=' "$F" && sed -ri 's|^\s*SELINUX=.*|SELINUX=enforcing|' "$F" || echo 'SELINUX=enforcing' >> "$F"); setenforce 1 2>/dev/null; elif command -v aa-enforce >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl enable --now apparmor 2>/dev/null; fi
F=/etc/profile; cp -a "$F" "$F.mxbak" 2>/dev/null; (grep -qE '^\s*(export\s+)?TMOUT=' "$F" && sed -ri 's|^\s*(export\s+)?TMOUT=.*|export TMOUT=800|' "$F" || echo 'export TMOUT=800' >> "$F")

rules.title: 审计实施 (Audit Controls)
rules.description: §164.312(b) 实施 hardware/software/procedural 审计机制

fix.suggestion: audit.rules 至少包含 -w /etc/passwd -p wa + -a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S execve
fix.command: F=/etc/audit/rules.d/mxsec-hipaa.rules; mkdir -p /etc/audit/rules.d; cp -a "$F" "$F.mxbak" 2>/dev/null; printf '%s\n' '-w /etc/passwd -p wa -k identity' '-w /etc/shadow -p wa -k identity' '-a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S execve -k exec' > "$F"; systemctl enable --now auditd 2>/dev/null; augenrules --load 2>/dev/null || auditctl -R "$F" 2>/dev/null

if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then dnf install -y aide || yum install -y aide; elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then yum install -y aide; elif command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y aide; fi

rules.title: MFA / 2FA (SSH 密钥认证)
rules.description: §164.312(d) 身份认证 — 至少密钥认证, 推荐 MFA

fix.command: F=/etc/ssh/sshd_config; cp -a "$F" "$F.mxbak"; (grep -qiE '^\s*#?\s*PasswordAuthentication' "$F" && sed -ri 's|^\s*#?\s*PasswordAuthentication.*|PasswordAuthentication no|I' "$F" || echo 'PasswordAuthentication no' >> "$F"); if sshd -t; then if systemctl list-unit-files 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^sshd\.service'; then systemctl restart sshd; else systemctl restart ssh; fi; else mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

fix.suggestion: 禁用 telnet/ftp/rsh, 替为 SSH/SFTP/HTTPS
fix.command: for s in telnet.socket ftp rsh.socket; do systemctl disable --now "$s" 2>/dev/null; systemctl mask "$s" 2>/dev/null; done; true
